_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to coordinate cyber operations with other organization functions or support activities.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, IT infrastructure, business units, and vendor organizations to maintain effective data service delivery.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-001 (TF, cosine: 0.476), RC-A-001 (RC, cosine: 0.473).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.631). Shared vocabulary: [ability]. DCWF-only terms [activities, coordinate, cyber, functions, operations, organization] vs WIDAI-only terms [build, business, cross, data, delivery, effective] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.882 (P=0.887, R=0.878). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Ability to coordinate cyber operations with other organization functions or supp" and "Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, I" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.477 < STS 0.631 (gap -0.155). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [activities, coordinate, cyber] and [build, business, cross] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.5%. Shared tokens: [ability]. DCWF-only: [activities, coordinate, cyber, functions, operations, organization]. WIDAI-only: [build, business, cross, data, delivery, effective].
